'''sahunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nichil|nichil]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-h-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nichil|nichil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sahunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæhinith|sæhinith]] || [[word:sæhinij|sæhinij]] || [[word:sæhinish|sæhinish]] || [[word:sæhini|sæhini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sahuhunuth|sahuhunuth]] || [[word:sahuhunuj|sahuhunuj]] || [[word:sahuhunush|sahuhunush]] || [[word:sahuhunu|sahuhunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sahunuth|sahunuth]] || [[word:sahunuj|sahunuj]] || [[word:sahunush|sahunush]] || [[word:sahunu|sahunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sahufnuth|sahufnuth]] || [[word:sahufnuj|sahufnuj]] || [[word:sahufnush|sahufnush]] || [[word:sahufnuf|sahufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sahunuthu|sahunuthu]] || [[word:sahunuju|sahunuju]] || [[word:sahunushu|sahunushu]] || [[word:sahunuku|sahunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sahunuth|sahunuth]] || [[word:sahunuj|sahunuj]] || [[word:sahunush|sahunush]] || [[word:sahunu|sahunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sahunuthul|sahunuthul]] || [[word:sahunujul|sahunujul]] || [[word:sahunushul|sahunushul]] || [[word:sahunukul|sahunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sahunuthuthu|sahunuthuthu]] || [[word:sahunujuju|sahunujuju]] || [[word:sahunushushu|sahunushushu]] || [[word:sahunuku|sahunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sahunuthun|sahunuthun]] || [[word:sahunujun|sahunujun]] || [[word:sahunushun|sahunushun]] || [[word:sahunukun|sahunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sahunuthuoro|sahunuthuoro]] || [[word:sahunujuoro|sahunujuoro]] || [[word:sahunushuoro|sahunushuoro]] || [[word:sahunukuoro|sahunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
